summary: Completed testing of ASR Solar Website iteration 11 features. All core features are working correctly. Backend: 11/12 tests passed (1 failed due to rate limiting - not a bug). Frontend: All UI tests passed.

ui_bugs.issue: Shows 'ERROR for site owner: Invalid domain for site key' - Existing issue from previous iteration
ui_bugs.priority: LOW - Does not block form submission

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED BUG: LeadCreate model's email field was required (EmailStr) but simplified inquiry form doesn't include email. Changed to Optional[str] = '' in /app/backend/server.py line 358
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Made LeadCreate.email optional to match simplified 6-field inquiry form

success_rate.backend: 92% (11/12 tests passed - 1 failed due to rate limiting)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 11 features verified: 1) Banner shows 'Make Your Electricity Bill ZERO!' (old ₹1,32,000 removed), 2) AI-Powered Smart Deals section removed, 3) Inquiry form has 6 fields (no email required), 4) POST /api/crm/generate-testimonial working, 5) GET /api/reviews returns live testimonials, 6) CRM Testimonials tab exists with generator form, 7) Logo has transparent background. One bug fixed: LeadCreate.email made optional.

banner_text_updated.details: Banner shows 'Switch to Solar & Make Your Electricity Bill ZERO!' - Old ₹1,32,000 text NOT present

ai_smart_deals_removed.details: AI-Powered Smart Deals section successfully removed from homepage

inquiry_form_6_fields.details: Form has 6 visible fields: Name, Mobile Number, District, Property Type, Monthly Bill, Solar Capacity + 1 hidden honeypot

generate_testimonial_api.details: POST /api/crm/generate-testimonial creates testimonial with auto-generated text

reviews_api.details: GET /api/reviews returns testimonials from database including 'Rajesh Kumar' and 'Test Customer'

testimonials_homepage.details: Testimonials section on homepage shows live reviews from database

crm_testimonials_tab.details: CRM Dashboard has Testimonials tab with generator form (name, address, solar_capacity, bill_before, bill_after, rating)

secure_lead_endpoint.details: POST /api/secure-lead works with 6 fields (no email required after bug fix)

api_endpoints_tested: POST /api/secure-lead - Form submission with 6 fields (PASSED - after bug fix)
POST /api/staff/verify-2fa - Staff 2FA (FAILED - rate limited, not a bug)

bug_fixed.issue: Inquiry form submission failing - LeadCreate model required email but form doesn't have email field
bug_fixed.fix: Changed 'email: EmailStr' to 'email: Optional[str] = ""' in LeadCreate model
